name: combo-meter
title: Combo-meter JUICY â€” 8-effect stack (badge hue-shift+lettering trail+shake scaling+radial flash+ring burst+slow-mo+freeze+broken feedback)
hypothesis: Combo meter (x1..x5) top-right reacts to consecutive hits with a stacked-juice feedback loop (hue-shift badge, ring-burst sparks, radial flash, screen-shake scaling, slow-mo + freeze on x5, COMBO BROKEN on miss/timeout). Hypothesis: layering 6+ composed effects per increment turns the mechanic into a thumb-stop dopamine hit, raising perceived depth and time-on-creative.
diff_from_baseline: playable/combo_meter.js (NEW ~280 LOC): state machine (count, level, hue interpolation, sparks pool, slowMo/freeze gates), API recordHit/recordMiss/getComboMultiplier/getTimeScale/getComboShakePx/drawComboMeter
Effect 1 â€” Top-right badge (xâ‰ˆ440 yâ‰ˆ130) with radial halo pulse + bold-italic stroked digit + pop-bounce on increment (1.0â†’1.4â†’1.0/250ms)
Effect 2 â€” Background hue gradient slides between palette stops (#FFD23Aâ†’#FF8C2Aâ†’#FF3838â†’#FF2AA0â†’#3AAEFF) with 200ms eased interpolation, not brutal swap

Effect 3 â€” Lettering 'xN COMBO!' via spawnComboPraise extended in praise_floats.js: italic bold 76px, dual stroke (hue-of-level outer + black inner), Â±10Â° rotation jitter, 3 ghost trail copies fading at 35% alpha
Effect 4 â€” Screen-shake amplitude scales (x2â†’4px, x3â†’8px, x4â†’11px, x5â†’14px) with 250ms decay, applied via overlay translate cumulative with existing shake
Effect 5 â€” Radial flash full-screen on level-up: alpha 0â†’0.25â†’0 over 200ms, hue assorted to multiplier, blend lighter
Effect 6 â€” Particle ring burst: 14 sparks emitted radially from badge center on level-up, hue-matched, vel 220-400px/s with strong drag, fade 600ms, additive blending, pool capped at 60

Effect 7 â€” Slow-mo on x5 reach: 80ms freeze-frame (timeScale 0.05) then 250ms slow (timeScale 0.55) exposed via getTimeScale(); script.js paints a white-flash dim proportional to (1-ts) for visible time-warp without invasively patching physics dt
Effect 8 â€” COMBO BROKEN feedback: 2.2s no-fire watchdog in script.js triggers recordMiss â†’ red 'COMBO BROKEN!' praise + badge fades to grey for 800ms
scene_exterior/index.js: import combo_meter; at _impactEnemy callsite call recordHit() and multiply pendingEnemyDmg by getComboMultiplier() (rounded)
playable/script.js: import combo_meter, draw inside translate-shake save/restore, slow-mo white-flash overlay, miss watchdog tied to player_fire timestamps
juicy_omitted: hp_bar_overshoot: invasive on shared/hud_top, deferred â€” wiring an overshoot scaler from combo state would require shared/hud_top changes outside the V2 isolation budget
review_notes: All critical signatures present: COMBO x6, COMBO BROKEN x1 (miss feedback), and all 4 hue palette stops (FFD23A, FF8C2A, FF3838, FF2AA0) confirming background hue gradient. Bundle 2894KB (+5KB vs baseline; consistent with combo_meter.js + hooks). Axis 'mechanic' respected â€” drag-aim-fire-impact loop preserved (recordHit hooked at _impactEnemy, multiplier rounding non-invasive). 8/8 juicy items implemented.
